import React from 'react'; import '../styles/Experience.css'; const Experience = () => { return (

Work Experience

{/* Data Analyst */}

Data Analyst

University At Albany | Jan 2025 – Dec 2025

Python PyTorch TensorFlow scikit-learn NumPy Pandas OpenCV Matplotlib Seaborn Jupyter Notebook Linux Git CUDA 3D CNN CNN-LSTM
  • Analyzed 10,000+ cardiac ultrasound videos from EchoNet-Dynamic, performing EDA on temporal, spatial, and morphological features to identify EF predictors
  • Built and benchmarked CNN-LSTM, 3D CNN, and multi-task models, reducing EF MAE from 8.1 to 4.9 through statistical evaluation
  • Applied self-supervised contrastive learning (SimCLR) to generate feature embeddings, improving regression and segmentation without additional labels
  • Designed multi-task learning framework integrating LV segmentation and EF regression, achieving 0.90 Dice score
  • Engineered synthetic data augmentation (SimLVSeg) to address imbalance, improving segmentation IoU by 9%
  • Implemented attention-based segmentation for improved small-structure (mitral valve) detection
  • Extracted temporal motion features using 3D convolutional encoders (RVENet-style) for EF estimation
  • Optimized pipelines with hyperparameter tuning, learning rate scheduling, and loss balancing to reduce overfitting
  • Delivered interpretable AI outputs (segmentation overlays, motion visualizations) to support clinical decision-making
{/* Data Engineer */}

Data Engineer

Quantiphi | Mar 2021 – Nov 2023

Microsoft Azure Azure Data Factory V2 Azure Data Lake Gen2 Azure Databricks EMR EC2 Python Django Pandas SQL MongoDB Apache Airflow Apache Spark PySpark Kafka Spark Streaming Hadoop Storm Terraform Ansible Git Shell Scripting Power BI
  • Designed and deployed Azure-based containerized infrastructure, improving data processing capacity by 20%
  • Configured databases and backend applications while managing large datasets with Pandas and SQL
  • Created and automated Airflow DAGs in Python executing jobs on EMR and EC2 clusters
  • Built and tested applications with SQL and MongoDB
  • Utilized Azure Data Factory V2 to ingest data into Azure Data Lake Gen2
  • Implemented CI/CD pipelines and deployed microservices using Python and Shell scripting
  • Ingested real-time weblogs via Kafka into Spark Streaming and performed data validation
  • Worked on Big Data integration using Hadoop, PySpark, Kafka, Storm, and webMethods
  • Managed Databricks clusters and optimized Spark DataFrame operations
  • Maintained CI/CD pipelines using Git, Terraform, and Ansible
  • Performed data validation in Power BI and maintained data integrity processes
{/* Education */}

Education

{/* Masters */}

Master of Science in Information Science (DA/AI)

State University of New York, University at Albany | Jan 2024 – Dec 2025

Specialized in Data Cleaning, ETL, and Data Visualization.

Analytics & Prediction Geographic Information Systems Database Systems and Data Analysis Predictive Modeling Data Mining Information Environment Applied Machine Learning Administration of Information Agencies Information and Knowledge Organization Research Methods Quantitative Methods and Statistics
{/* Bachelors */}

Bachelor of Science in Computer Science (Cloud Technology & Mobile Applications)

Jain University, India | Jan 2020 – Dec 2023

Linux Administration Cloud Migration Database Management Systems Predictive Modeling Data Mining iOS Development in Swift Mobile Application Development (Open Source) Agile Software Development Cloud Computing Infrastructure Solutions on Cloud Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
); }; export default Experience;
